body.description: 2-3 sentences: key facts, practical info. Accent words in bold. Ukrainian, HTML only.

pt_paragraph.description: 2-3 sentences in simple Portuguese (A2 level) summarizing the news. MUST use all vocab words naturally. Short sentences, present tense, basic grammar. No HTML tags.

pt.description: Portuguese term as used in PT sources

uk.description: Accurate Ukrainian dictionary translation (literal, not paraphrase)

vocab.description: 3-5 Portuguese vocabulary words with precise Ukrainian translations
